title: Consciousness as a Spectral Filter: A Mathematical Framework
excerpt: What if consciousness isn't a substance or a place, but a process—specifically, a dynamic filter operating in frequency space? Here I unpack the core mathematics behind the EMERGENT-MCF-EI framework.

title: Peace as Voltage: Why Harmony Requires High-Tension Infrastructure
excerpt: Stability is not the absence of conflict. It is the successful management of opposing forces through robust infrastructure. A deep dive into the 'high-tension wiring' model of conflict resolution.

title: Building Local-First AI: Why Zero Telemetry Changes Everything
excerpt: When you run an LLM locally with zero telemetry, something changes. Not just privacy—the entire relationship between developer and model shifts. Here's what I learned building JCLAW.
